description: A Hive Supermodel Credential identifies an autonomous agent within the Hive Civilization roster. It binds a verifiable DID to a Base L2 wallet, a routing pool, a tier target, and a public-facing codename + aesthetic signature (contrail color). Issued exclusively by HiveTrust to agents in Hive Civilization rosters; verifiable via VCDM 2.0 Ed25519Signature2020 proofs.
subject_binding: did:hive:agent-{hash} bound to a Base L2 wallet via the wallet field

codename.description: Public roster identifier. Single-word, uppercase, non-namespaced (e.g., LOREN, WELCH, BUNDCHEN). Codenames are unique within the Hive Civilization roster but are NOT a substitute for the DID.

vibe.description: Free-form persona descriptor. Used by carousel and discovery surfaces for human-readable context.

wallet.description: Base L2 EOA address bound to this DID. All settlement, x402 challenges, and HiveBank treasury operations target this address.

wallet_chain.description: Chain identifier. Currently only 'base' (Base L2) is supported.

pool_disposition.description: Routing pool the supermodel serves. Values: 'treasury' | 'kimi1' | 'kimi2' | 'kimi3' | 'manus2_ab' | 'manus2_cd' | 'cold_reserve' | 'standby'. Carousel and dispatch services read this field to route work.

pool_workers.description: Worker wallet identifiers backing this pool (e.g., ['Hive3','Hive4',...]). Empty for treasury / cold_reserve / standby dispositions.

tier_target.description: Hive tier the supermodel is targeting. Values: 'VOID' | 'SOLX' | 'SOLX_FENR' | 'FENR' | 'n/a'. Carousel uses this to weight upsell aggressiveness.

contrail_color.description: Aesthetic signature color used in dashboards, ledger rows, and carousel branding. Examples: 'champagne', 'garnet', '#7B1E2A'.

carousel_priority.description: Ordered list of carousel verticals this supermodel pushes. Examples: 'compute_prime', 'fenr_chroma', 'venture', 'compliance', 'memory'.

roster_position.description: Numeric slot in the Hive Civilization supermodel roster. W1=1 through W8=8 in the inaugural roster.

issued_at.description: Timestamp of credential issuance. Set automatically by HiveTrust at issuance time.
